subject: Assessors
bill.title: Assessors - As introduced, creates the Tennessee assessor of property certification board to review qualifications for the county office of assessor of property; creates new qualifications for such office. - Amends TCA Title 2; Title 4; Title 8, Chapter 18 and Title 67, Chapter 1.

action.description: P2C, ref. to State & Local Government Committee- Government Operations for Review
